allow: Bash(python -c "from data_loader import load_data; companies = load_data\(\); print\(f'Companies: {len\(companies\)}'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Companies: {d[\\"total_companies\\"]}, Capital: \\${d[\\"total_raised_b\\"]}B, Unicorns: {d[\\"unicorn_count\\"]}'\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Investors: {len\(d\)}, Top 3: {[i[\\"name\\"]+\\" \(\\"+str\(i[\\"portfolio_count\\"]\)+\\"\)\\" for i in d[:3]]}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Name: {d[\\"name\\"]}, Sector: {d[\\"sector\\"]}, Raised: \\${d[\\"total_raised\\"]}M, Stage: {d[\\"stage\\"]}, Deals: {len\(d[\\"deals\\"]\)}'\)")

PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -State Listen | Select-Object -ExpandProperty OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; Write-Output "killed")
